description:
Sets the angular velocity of the object in world space as a 3D vector. The units are in Rad/s and rotations are clockwise.
{{Feature|important|Angular velocity is limited to a range of +-1000 Rad/s.}}
examples: <sqf>myHeli setAngularVelocity [0,0,1]; // will cause the helicopter to spin around a vertical line passing through its center</sqf>
name: setAngularVelocity

Item.desc: angular velocity of the object in world space.
Item.name: vector
